changes_made: Changed k8s_audit_changes_by_authorized_users_logged to k8s_audit_authorized_user_changes_logged for clarity and consistency
review_notes: The functions are generally well-aligned with the NIST AU-12(3) control, focusing on audit logging and ensuring changes by authorized users are captured. The naming convention mostly follows the required pattern, but one function name was adjusted for better clarity and consistency with existing naming standards.
naming_improvements: Use 'authorized_user_changes_logged' instead of 'changes_by_authorized_users_logged' for better clarity
title: Audit Record Generation - Audit record generation | changes by authorized individuals provide and implemen
step1_reasoning: The control AU-12(3) focuses on audit record generation and ensuring that changes by authorized individuals are logged. In Kubernetes, this maps to enabling audit logging, configuring audit policies to capture relevant metadata, ensuring logs are retained for a specific period, and ensuring that changes made by authorized users are logged. These checks ensure that Kubernetes audit logs are comprehensive and meet compliance requirements.
